heading: Limitations on use of funds for laboratory directed research and development purposes
label: 6335 Limitations on use of funds for laboratory directed research and development purposes
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 6335 was renumbered .section 8335 of this titleProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , War and National Defense, prior to repeal by .section 2792 of Title 50Pub. L. 119–60, § 3111(b)(1)

children.heading: .—Limitation on Use of Weapons Activities Funds
children.label: a .—Limitation on Use of Weapons Activities Funds
children.text: No funds authorized to be appropriated or otherwise made available to the Department of Energy in any fiscal year after fiscal year 1997 for weapons activities may be obligated or expended for activities under the Department of Energy Laboratory Directed Research and Development Program, or under any Department of Energy technology transfer program or cooperative research and development agreement, unless such activities support the national security mission of the Department of Energy.

children.heading: .—Limitation on Use of Certain Other Funds
children.label: b .—Limitation on Use of Certain Other Funds
children.text: No funds authorized to be appropriated or otherwise made available to the Department of Energy in any fiscal year after fiscal year 1997 for defense environmental cleanup may be obligated or expended for activities under the Department of Energy Laboratory Directed Research and Development Program, or under any Department of Energy technology transfer program or cooperative research and development agreement, unless such activities support the defense environmental cleanup mission of the Department of Energy.

children.heading: .—Limitation on Use of Funds for Overhead
children.label: c .—Limitation on Use of Funds for Overhead
children.text: A national security laboratory may not use funds made available under section 6331(c) to cover the costs of general and administrative overhead for the laboratory.
